sentences.target: Ton argument tient pas vraiment la route.
sentences.reading: /tɔ̃ aʁɡymɑ̃ tjɛ̃ pa vʁɛmɑ̃ la ʁut/

translations.fr: Ton argument tient pas vraiment la route.
translations.ipa: /tɔ̃ aʁɡymɑ̃ tjɛ̃ pa vʁɛmɑ̃ la ʁut/
translations.en: Your argument doesn’t really hold up.
translations.es: Tu argumento no se sostiene realmente.
translations.de: Dein Argument hält nicht wirklich stand.
translations.it: Il tuo argomento non regge davvero.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的论点并不太站得住脚。
translations.yue: 你嘅論點唔太企得住腳。
translations.pt: Seu argumento não se sustenta muito.
translations.he: הטיעון שלך לא ממש מחזיק מים.
translations.vi: Lập luận của bạn không thật sự thuyết phục.
translations.nl: Jouw argument houdt niet echt stand.
translations.hu: Az érved nem igazán állja meg a helyét.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी दलील ज़्यादा टिकती नहीं है.
translations.pl: Twój argument nie bardzo się broni.
translations.el: Το επιχείρημά σου δεν στέκει ιδιαίτερα.
translations.nb: Argumentet ditt holder ikke helt vann.
translations.ro: Argumentul tău nu prea se susține.
translations.ja: あなたの主張はあまり筋が通っていません。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), masculine singular, modifies 'argument'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the noun phrase.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; here part of the idiom 'tenir la route' (to be sound/credible).
Negation adverb; used here without 'ne' (colloquial) to negate the verb.
Adverb of degree, intensifies the negation.
Definite article, feminine singular, introduces 'route'.
Common noun, feminine singular; part of the idiom 'tenir la route'.

sentences.target: Je n’ai aucun argument contre ça.

translations.fr: Je n’ai aucun argument contre ça.
translations.en: I have no argument against that.
translations.es: No tengo ningún argumento en contra de eso.
translations.it: Non ho alcun argomento contro questo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我没有任何反对的理由。
translations.yue: 我冇任何理據去反對嗰件事。
translations.ru: У меня нет никаких аргументов против этого.
translations.pt: Não tenho nenhum argumento contra isso.
translations.he: אין לי שום טיעון נגד זה.
translations.vi: Tôi không có lập luận nào chống lại điều đó.
translations.ar: ليس لدي أي حجة ضد ذلك.
translations.nl: Ik heb geen enkel argument daartegen.
translations.uk: У мене немає жодних аргументів проти цього.
translations.hi: मुझे उसके खिलाफ कोई तर्क नहीं है.
translations.pl: Nie mam żadnego argumentu przeciwko temu.
translations.el: Δεν έχω κανένα επιχείρημα εναντίον αυτού.
translations.nb: Jeg har ingen argumenter mot det.
translations.id: Saya tidak punya argumen apa pun untuk menentangnya.
translations.sv: Jag har inga argument mot det.
translations.ro: Nu am niciun argument împotriva acestui lucru.
translations.da: Jeg har ingen argumenter imod det.
translations.fi: Minulla ei ole yhtään perustelua sitä vastaan.
translations.ja: それに反対する理由はまったくありません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb 'avoir', present indicative, 1st person singular, with attached elided negative clitic 'ne' (n’).
Negative polarity determiner, masculine singular, modifies 'argument' ('no/not any').
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'ai'.
Preposition introducing an argument/complement expressing opposition.
Demonstrative pronoun referring to a previously mentioned proposition/thing.

sentences.target: Ils cherchent un argument pour convaincre.

translations.fr: Ils cherchent un argument pour convaincre.
translations.en: They’re looking for an argument to persuade.
translations.es: Están buscando un argumento para convencer.
translations.de: Sie suchen ein Argument, um zu überzeugen.
translations.it: Stanno cercando un argomento per convincere.
translations.ko: 그들은 설득하기 위한 논거를 찾고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在寻找一个能说服人的论点。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺度搵可以說服人嘅理據。
translations.pt: Eles estão procurando um argumento para convencer.
translations.tr: İkna etmek için bir argüman arıyorlar.
translations.vi: Họ đang tìm một lập luận để thuyết phục.
translations.nl: Ze zoeken een argument om te overtuigen.
translations.hi: वे मनाने के लिए कोई तर्क ढूँढ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουν ένα επιχείρημα για να πείσουν.
translations.nb: De leter etter et argument for å overbevise.
translations.id: Mereka sedang mencari argumen untuk meyakinkan.
translations.sv: De letar efter ett argument för att övertyga.
translations.ro: Ei caută un argument ca să convingă.
translations.da: De leder efter et argument for at overbevise.
translations.ja: 彼らは説得するための論拠を探している。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine default).
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introduces 'argument'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherchent'.
Preposition introducing a purpose clause with an infinitive.
Infinitive verb complement expressing purpose.

sentences.target: Notre meilleur argument est la qualité.

translations.fr: Notre meilleur argument est la qualité.
translations.en: Our best argument is the quality.
translations.es: Nuestro mejor argumento es la calidad.
translations.de: Unser bestes Argument ist die Qualität.
translations.it: Il nostro miglior argomento è la qualità.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们最有力的论点是质量。
translations.yue: 我哋最好嘅理據就係質素。
translations.pt: Nosso melhor argumento é a qualidade.
translations.he: הטיעון הטוב ביותר שלנו הוא האיכות.
translations.vi: Lập luận mạnh nhất của chúng tôi là chất lượng.
translations.nl: Ons beste argument is de kwaliteit.
translations.hi: हमारा सबसे अच्छा तर्क गुणवत्ता है.
translations.el: Το καλύτερο επιχείρημά μας είναι η ποιότητα.
translations.ro: Cel mai bun argument al nostru este calitatea.
translations.ja: 私たちのいちばんの強みは品質です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person plural, modifies 'argument'.
Adjective (synthetic comparative/superlative of 'bon'), masculine singular, agrees with 'argument'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular, linking subject to predicate.
Definite article, feminine singular, introduces 'qualité'.
Common noun, feminine singular; predicate nominal.
